seo.metaTitle: Declarion – Continuous Compliance & Third-Party Risk Management Platform
seo.metaDescription: Declarion is a platform for continuous compliance and third-party risk management. Continuously monitor controls, automatically document audit-ready evidence, and keep risks in view at all times.

hero.title: Why Declarion
hero.description: Continuous compliance for modern businesses. Declarion enables organizations to continuously monitor compliance, identify risks at an early stage, and document audit-ready evidence in a structured manner. Our platform connects regulatory requirements with modern technology. Compliance and risk teams can efficiently manage processes, transparently assess third-party risks, and remain audit-ready at all times.

niche.title: Declarion was developed to support organizations in addressing increasing regulatory requirements – with a clear focus on continuous compliance and third-party risk management.

items.title: The Challenge
items.description: Organizations today face a growing number of regulatory requirements. Compliance evidence, control mechanisms, and third-party risks must be documented, monitored, and proven audit-ready at all times. In many organizations, however, this information is spread across different systems, documents, and processes. This results in a lack of transparency regarding the current compliance status, high manual effort during audits and reviews, difficult-to-trace evidence chains, and increased risks related to third parties and suppliers.

items.title: Our Solution
items.description: Declarion provides a centralized platform for continuous compliance and third-party risk management. Our solution enables organizations to continuously monitor compliance controls, systematically capture and assess third-party risks, automatically document audit-relevant evidence, and transparently map regulatory requirements. Through structured workflows, clear responsibilities, and audit-proof documentation, compliance evolves from a reactive process into a continuous management tool.

items.title: Our Promise
items.description: We help organizations make compliance simpler, more transparent, and scalable. With Declarion, companies can efficiently meet regulatory requirements, confidently manage audits and reviews, identify and control risks at an early stage, and sustainably digitize compliance processes. Our platform combines regulatory expertise with modern technology, enabling compliance teams to focus on what matters most: understanding risks and making informed decisions.

members.name: Dr. Philipp Tranacher
members.bio: PhD, certified public auditor, tax advisor, and attorney. Over 15 years of experience in international tax and regulatory environments, as well as advising on complex compliance and governance structures.

members.name: Nils Löwe
members.bio: Master’s degree in Computer and Electrical Engineering as well as Information Technology. Over 10 years of experience in software architecture, platform development, and the digitization of regulatory processes.

members.name: Dr. Juliane Tranacher
members.bio: PhD. Over 15 years of experience in marketing, communications, and strategic positioning in the financial and professional services sector.

items.title: Precision
items.subtitle: Compliance requires accuracy and reliability.
items.description: Declarion is designed to structure regulatory requirements and document evidence in a traceable manner. This ensures that compliance processes remain transparent, audit-ready, and robust.

items.title: Digital First
items.subtitle: Complex compliance processes are made efficient through automation and digital workflows.
items.description: Declarion transforms manual documentation and control processes into structured, scalable, and digital workflows that integrate seamlessly into existing business processes.

items.title: Customer Focus
items.subtitle: Compliance and risk management must not only meet regulatory requirements but also work in day-to-day operations.
items.description: Our platform supports teams in their daily work, simplifies decision-making, and creates transparency around risks and controls.

items.title: Transparency
items.subtitle: Traceability is the foundation of any successful compliance structure.
items.description: Declarion enables clear documentation of controls, responsibilities, and evidence, ensuring that organizations always maintain a transparent overview of their compliance status.
